items.name_en: LO‚Ąģw‚ĄģūüĆüSmall SizeūüÜēNappa Squeeze Handbag ūüĎú A refined and soft new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crinkled body, an adjustable donut chain, and a soft-touch handle. This small size is crafted from Nappa sheep leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, plus an extra chain to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure* Internal zip pocket *Unlined* loewe hot stamping or silver stamping.

LOCY BB Series ūüÖľ44141 Uninspected Version #
‚Ěź Size: 20*16*7.5cm ‚Ěź
A classic vintage series that is impossible to resist at first glance. This Locy BB is a reimagined version of the classic One Handle. As a perennial bestseller and versatile classic, it remains a "must-have" after the test of time. It maintains high sales volume and excellent resale value. With various carrying styles using the wrist strap or long shoulder strap, it is stylish and unique!
Locky BB suits every mood and occasion. Beautiful and distinctive, it is the magic king that every woman cannot resist!
